title: Sujyot Eye Care Clinic | Specialist in Custom made Ocular Prosthesis
description: Our services include artificial eye in mumbai, Fake eye, False eye, Ocular prosthesis, maxillofacial prosthesis, Ear, nose prosthesis

About us GET IN TOUCH Email: info@sujyoteyecare.com Clinic: Kurla (E), Mumbai Whatsapp: +91-98707-53552 Our Services Custom made Ocular Prosthesis An prosthetic eye can help improve the appearance of people who have lost an eye Speciality Contact Lenses These lenses are used primarily for irregular cornea conditions as an alternative to traditional soft, rigid or hybrid lenses. Low vision Low vision is the loss of sight that is not correctible with prescription eyeglasses Why Choose sujyot Clinic The peace of mind you need. The commitment you deserve. Each of our patients is unique. They come to sujyot Clinic with their own, defined pasts and entrust us with their yet-to-be-determined futures. We hold this immense responsibility sacred, which is why we strive to deliver the best possible prosthetic care for each person we serve. While we pride ourselves on our clinical expertise, it’s our community that truly sets us apart. Our commitment to empower, encourage, and connect with one another makes us who we area family. You should entrust it only to the best professionals. Our Vision for Quality Sujyot defines quality as “the degree of excellence; the extent to which an team meets patients  needs and exceeds their expectations”. Key attributes of high quality healthcare systems, with safety, timeliness, effectiveness, efficiency, equity and patient centeredness. Personalized treatment We prioritize our patients over everything else and this is why we keep evolving and finding different and better ways to provide innovative services to all our patients.
